_source: Mirrors the AIAT cohort application Google Form. When live API returns members, this file is bypassed; when API is empty / failing, this file feeds the UI.
_rule: Edit `data` array as members get added during bootcamp. By default it contains ONE template entry — the UI shows it as a mock placeholder. When >=1 real entry is added (or live API returns real data), the template is hidden by `lib/api.ts`'s placeholder-filtering logic.
_language: All site copy is English-only. Even though the AIAT form is bilingual, the rendered site stays EN. Use English values only here.

_field_docs.fullname_en: string|optional — RESERVED, leave null unless cohort wants a secondary EN variant
_field_docs.ai_skill: string|optional — single primary AI strength (e.g. 'Agentic AI')
_field_docs.interesting: string[] — AI interests, up to 5 of: ml | nlp | cv | ethics | genai
_field_docs.call: string|null — phone with country code, e.g. '+66 81 234 5678'
_field_docs.video_links: string[] — intro video URLs (YouTube / TikTok / Instagram)

_template_marker: When `data` contains only one entry AND its `aiat_id` === '000000', the UI treats it as a MOCK and renders a single placeholder card with a `MOCK` badge. Add real members to switch off the mock.

data.slogan: Member motto goes here — replace with the real line.
